title: Wither Star
description: Nether star?? There aren't stars in the Nether, Duh!
body:
# Wither Star + Beacon
I don't know, it just makes sense to me for the star to be some kind of core that gives the Wither it's power. So I made this, replacing the "Nether Star" for a "Wither Star".

With the new star done, it made sense to change the only thing that it is used for: The Beacon.
So I made a darker version and also changed its glass frame (it doesn't change actual glass, only the beacon one)

## Preview
![A dark star with a white dot on its center, dropped on top of netherrack with fire nearby.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yYWkZMxQ/images/2a5040df9c69468d9f8ca6e988527afe92678b5c.png)
![A full beacon made of netherite placed on a nether wasted biome.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yYWkZMxQ/images/56933e0cbf5e072800fc991bd537d4a2bc85723a.png)
##### *Screenshots taken with [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)
